name: cross_product_negative
differences: Image B depicts jeans, while Image A depicts a chess set.
The color and material in Image B are denim, whereas Image A shows wood.
Image B has stitching details typical of jeans, not present in Image A.
Image B includes branding and text related to jeans, absent in Image A.

name: jeans_gpt_iter0
differences: Color is darker in Image B
Stitching color differs

name: jeans_gpt_iter4
differences: Image B has a darker wash compared to Image A.
The stitching in Image B is less prominent and appears darker.
Image A shows a more pronounced faded effect on the thighs.

name: headphones_flux_iter0
differences: The color in Image B is a brighter blue compared to the darker navy blue in Image A.
The logo on the ear cup in Image B is white, whereas it is metallic in Image A.
The text 'studio3' is positioned differently and appears in a different color in Image B.
The ear cushions in Image B appear to have a different texture and finish compared to Image A.

name: headphones_flux_iter4
differences: Image B has a camouflage pattern, while Image A is solid blue.
The color in Image B is a lighter blue compared to the darker blue in Image A.
Image B has pink accents on the headband, which are not present in Image A.
The logo color differs: Image B has a white logo, while Image A has a metallic logo.

name: chess_set_flux_iter0
differences: Image B has a different color scheme for the chess pieces, using gold and black instead of light and dark wood tones.
The chessboard in Image B has a different wood pattern and lacks the decorative border seen in Image A.
The chess pieces in Image B have a different design and shape compared to those in Image A.
Image B does not show the numbering and lettering on the chessboard edges present in Image A.
The material appearance of the chess pieces in Image B is more polished and shiny compared to the carved wood look in Image A.

name: chess_set_flux_iter4
differences: Image B has a different color scheme with a more uniform wood tone, while Image A has contrasting light and dark squares.
The chess pieces in Image B have a smoother, more polished finish compared to the carved details in Image A.
Image B lacks the intricate patterns and numbering on the board present in Image A.
The border design in Image B is ornate and carved, unlike the simpler border in Image A.
